en: mechanics to quantum mechanics For example in classical mechanics there's this thing called Noether's theorem Every time there's a

en: I wait for 10 minutes I still have the same laws of physics So there's time transition invariance This corresponds to the law of conservation of

en: energy So there's this fundamental connection between symmetry and conservation
ko: 에너지 보존 법칙과 연결돼.
